title: Upcoming community session: How to best managing your tasks in monday.com (May 23)
excerpt: Managing multiple projects and boards can be overwhelming, but you can manage all your tasks like a pro with the right tools and strategies. Join us for an insightful session with monday.com product manager Inbal and kno…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Managing multiple projects and boards can be overwhelming, but you can manage all your tasks like a pro with the right tools and strategies. Join us for an insightful session with monday.com product manager Inbal and knowledge expert Leora as they guide us through the art of task management using different monday.com tools, including MyWork, Item notifications, filtering, mentions, your inbox, and more!

Whether you’re new to monday.com or looking to refine your skills, this session is for you!

posts.author: chrisdegenaars (Chris Degenaars)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Julietteb where can we find the recording for this?

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Just upload the recording to our community forum! Watch it here
